metadata.title: Praxis Loten — Physiotherapy & Rehabilitation in Eupen
metadata.description: Your health partner in Eupen. Manual therapy, sports physiotherapy, jaw therapy, lymphatic drainage. Post-operative rehabilitation.

hero.subtitle: Your health partner in Eupen for active and personalized rehabilitation.

services.sectionSubtitle: Discover our specialized therapies for your rehabilitation and well-being.

manualTherapy.title: Manual Therapy
manualTherapy.description: Treatment of musculoskeletal disorders. Biopsychosocial approach for lasting recovery.

sportPhysio.title: Sports Physiotherapy
sportPhysio.description: Rehabilitation after sports injuries, injury prevention and performance enhancement.

jaw.title: Jaw Therapy (TMJ)
jaw.description: Therapy for jaw disorders, headaches, dizziness and craniomandibular dysfunction.

lymph.title: Lymphatic Drainage
lymph.description: Gentle massage to reduce edema after surgery, tumor treatment or sports injuries.

rehab.sectionSubtitle: We guide you back to pain-free movement.

hip.title: Hip Replacement
hip.description: Accelerated rehabilitation after total hip replacement with personalized treatment plan.

knee.title: Knee Replacement
knee.description: Targeted strengthening and mobilization for optimal recovery after knee replacement.

acl.title: ACL Reconstruction
acl.description: Progressive rehabilitation after ACL surgery through to return to sport.

shoulder.title: Shoulder Surgery
shoulder.description: Gentle restoration of shoulder function after surgical intervention.

rehab.disclaimer: These 4 are the most common — we treat all orthopaedic conditions requiring physiotherapy.

team.sectionSubtitle: Experienced therapists dedicated to your health.

philippe.quote: Physiotherapist since 2012, driven every day to provide the highest quality, most individualized treatment.

florence.quote: The body is a unit, a harmonious whole composed of interdependent parts.

felix.quote: Freshly graduated in 2021, I've always wanted to help others.

fabienne.quote: Physiotherapist since 2013, working with passion and dedication.

thom.quote: Physiotherapist since 2015, using every experience to meet your expectations.

loic.quote: Recently graduated and passionate about the human body.

cabinet.equipment: Manuthera 242 — Treatment table imported from Finland for maximum comfort.

testimonials.sectionSubtitle: What our patients say about us.

cta.title: Ready to move pain-free?
cta.subtitle: Book your appointment online or contact us directly.

footer.description: Your physiotherapy and rehabilitation practice in Eupen. A human and professional approach to your health.

cancellation.title: Cancellation
cancellation.text: 24 hours in advance. Any session not cancelled within this period will be charged.
